INSTITUTIONAL and FINANCIAL: Total number of outstanding debt obligations held by the customer.
Duration of the customer's relationship with the bank in months.
Count of active bank accounts under the customer's name.
Ratio of total monthly debt payments to gross monthly income.
Aggregate value of all financial assets owned by the customer.
Classification of the customer's historical payment behavior pattern.
Maximum borrowing amount authorized on a revolving credit account.
Sum of current credit obligations from all active accounts.
Numerical credit score from a major credit bureau at application time.
Total number of open credit card accounts held by the customer.
Length of the customer's historical credit record in years.
Principal amount of the loan requested by the applicant.
Indicator of whether the customer sought debt advisory services.
Term of the loan agreement expressed in months.
Current available balance in the primary bank account.
Stated purpose for which the loan funds are intended.
Credit score version identifier used by the credit bureau for the pull.
Number of late payments recorded on the credit report in the last twelve months.
Age of the oldest credit account on file expressed in years.
Credit utilization ratio computed from revolving account balances and limits.
Number of hard inquiries posted to the credit report within six months.
Public record flag for bankruptcy discharge on the credit history.
The payment status for the most recent installment loan is recorded by the credit bureau.
Total number of accounts ever delinquent by thirty days or more.
Date of first delinquency on the oldest collection account.
Consumer statement presence flag on the credit file.
The credit report issue date is set by the bureau's file extraction timestamp.
Total revolving credit limit summed across all open trade lines.
Mortgage account payment history string for the past twenty-four months.
Charge-off account count on the credit report from creditor actions.
Credit score reason codes provided by the scoring model are stored.
Average age of open accounts computed from credit file detail.
Foreclosure status flag on any mortgage account in the past seven years.
Number of accounts with zero balance currently on the credit report.
Credit report dispute flag indicating an active investigation.
Monthly payment amount for the customer's oldest installment loan.
Score band category assigned by the financial institution's risk policy.
Total monthly debt service obligation across all credit products.
Back-end debt-to-income ratio inclusive of housing and non-housing debts.
Front-end debt-to-income ratio limited to housing expenses only.
Aggregate balance of all open installment loans at the reporting date.
Total line of credit exposure from committed and uncommitted facilities.
Net monthly surplus after debt payments and essential living expenses.
Total revolving debt outstanding on all credit card accounts.
Total monthly minimum payment sum for revolving credit accounts.
Total secured debt amount backed by collateral assets.
Total unsecured personal loan balance outstanding to date.
Number of active financial commitments with third-party guarantors.
Co-signed loan obligation amount for which the customer is liable.
Student loan debt balance from federal and private loan servicers.
Auto loan debt balance from the vehicle financing contract.
Home equity line of credit drawn amount at the statement date.
Total credit card balance across all bank-issued cards.
Tax lien debt amount from outstanding government obligations.
Medical debt collection balance from healthcare service bills.
Child support obligation monthly payment amount from court order.
Alimony obligation monthly payment amount per divorce decree.
Debt consolidation indicator for refinanced multiple obligations.
Date of the first deposit account opened with the financial institution.
Number of years the customer has maintained a continuous banking relationship.
Average monthly balance of the primary savings account over the past quarter.
Minimum balance maintained in the checking account during the last month.
Total deposit balance across all savings, checking, and money market accounts.
Certificate of deposit total value held at the institution.
Total investment assets under management with the institution's wealth division.
Value of retirement account assets held in IRA and 401k plans.
Safe deposit box rental status as a supplementary service.
Joint account flag for any deposit account with another holder.
Overdraft protection enrollment status on the primary transaction account.
Monthly direct deposit amount credited to the primary checking account.
Number of deposit products actively held by the customer at the bank.
Total number of external bank accounts linked via verified transfers.
Foreign currency account balance converted to the base currency equivalent.
Brokerage account total market value with the affiliated investment arm.
Time since last debit card transaction processed on the account.
Account dormancy flag triggered by no customer-initiated activity for twelve months.
Certified bank check issuance count over the past year.
Number of ATM transactions in a typical month from account statements.
Account closure indicator and the date when the relationship ended.
Application loan amount requested by the potential borrower.
Approved loan amount after the underwriting decision process.
Loan term in months as specified in the credit agreement.
Annual percentage rate on the loan contract at origination.
Collateral type classification for a secured loan product.
To compute the loan-to-value ratio, the loan amount is divided by the collateral appraisal.
Repayment frequency type such as monthly, bi-weekly, or weekly.
Origination fee percentage charged on the loan principal amount.
Prepayment penalty flag for the loan product variant.
Grace period duration before the first loan payment is due.
Interest rate type indicator for fixed versus variable rate loan.
Index rate used for a variable rate loan adjustment.
Margin over the index rate set for the variable rate product.
Rate adjustment frequency for a variable rate loan contract.
Balloon payment indicator for a partially amortized loan structure.
Draw period length for a home equity line of credit.
Maximum credit limit assigned to the approved revolving credit line.
Cash advance credit limit subset from the total card limit.
Balance transfer limit available on a credit card product.
Credit line increase request date and amount from the customer.
Promotional rate period end date for a balance transfer offer.
